query:
SELECT rating, 
  COUNT(*) as n,
  MIN(CAST(zspread AS DECIMAL(10,6))) as min_z,
  MAX(CAST(zspread AS DECIMAL(10,6))) as max_z,
  AVG(CAST(zspread AS DECIMAL(10,6))) as avg_z,
  STDDEV(CAST(zspread AS DECIMAL(10,6))) as std_z
FROM spread_analysis
WHERE indexador = 'IPCA SPREAD'
GROUP BY rating
ORDER BY avg_z DESC;
